means.mean: tài sản (của công ty hoặc cá nhân)
means.example: A company's intellectual property is a highly valuable asset.

means.mean: sự mua lại (công ty), thâu tóm
means.example: The tech giant announced its acquisition of the smaller startup.
The company's finances undergo an external audit every year.
The company was forced into bankruptcy after the crisis.
We need to stay within our marketing budget for this quarter.

means.mean: vốn chủ sở hữu, tính công bằng
means.example: He has built up considerable equity in his home.

means.mean: thuộc về ngân khố, tài chính
means.example: The company's fiscal year ends in December.

means.mean: trách nhiệm pháp lý, khoản nợ
means.example: The company's total liabilities exceeded its assets.
The merger of the two airlines created a major global competitor.

means.mean: danh mục đầu tư, hồ sơ trình bày
means.example: She has a diverse investment portfolio.
The factory's total revenue increased by 20% this year.
The parent company has several subsidiaries in Asia.
